name: jg-product-design-plugin-codex
description: Product-design skills for B-side PRD discussion, HTML prototype generation, prototype self-check, and ZenTao SR preparation.

interface.shortDescription: PRD, prototype, self-check, and ZenTao workflows.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin migrated from the original Claude product-design skills. It supports rough-demand to PRD discussion, PRD to HTML prototype work, prototype self-check reports, and PRD scope splitting for ZenTao SR preparation.
defaultPrompt: 把这个粗需求梳理成 PRD 思路。
根据这份 PRD 做 HTML 原型。
检查这个原型并给整改要求。
